details.test: Task 1: Book 60-min evening personal coaching session under $120
Task 2: Schedule 90-min conflict workshop for 8 people under $800
Task 4: Enroll in best-value leadership program (<=8 weeks, <=$1000, max sessions)
Task 5: Self-assessment to top-match coach and intro session booking
Task 6: Subscribe to newsletter and save two 4+ star leadership resources
Task 7: Request leadership coaching proposal for 20-person tech team
Task 8: Create reading list of 3 recent leadership articles (<=10 min read)
Task 9: Setup recurring 4-week personal coaching plan (weekly 60-min)
